- Pulse width of electron beam        = 5 ps

the time resolution of the particular detector:
0.8 ns (FWHM) for the LaBr3; 10 ns for the HPGe..
The flight path uncertainty of about 0.8 cm results in
a neutron energy resolution at 1 MeV of 3.3 and 33 keV
for the LaBr3 and HPGe detectors, respectively.
neutron flux 3x10**4 n/cm2/s at the sample position.
